llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: HR Specialist, Projects (6 months leasing contract)
job.company: BASF Asia-Pacific Service Centre Sdn. Bhd.
job.description: Objectives of the Position Effectively manage special projects assigned in HR area in line with the project deliverables and manage all stakeholders to ensure project deliverables are communicated effectively Responsibilities 1) Project Management Develop working relationships with the project owners and involved departments to ensure that project solutions are adopted, implemented and maintained appropriately. Provide HR support in project deliverables, identify challenges to be solved and contribute to providing resolutions by working closely with HR Business Partner and HR Center of excellence colleagues Monitor impact and outcome of implemented solutions with documentation of learnings. Assist in the systematic review, retrieval, evaluation, and secure destruction of HR document records in accordance with company policies and compliance standards. Ad-hoc Duties: Take on any other operational or strategic duties as assigned by Senior Manager, HR to support the broader HR team 2) Policy Consolidation Revamping Review Benchmark: Audit current HR policies against industry best practices and local labor laws to identify gaps and outdated clauses. Drafting Formatting: Rewrite, streamline, and consolidate policy handbooks for clarity and legal compliance. 3) Continuous Improvement Recommend and implement continuous improvement initiatives to improve HR excellence and customer satisfaction Process operational tasks along the HR Processes and identify areas for process improvement, automation, to increase efficiency and effectiveness of the HR team as a whole Requirements Minimum 2 years of relevant experience as an HR Specialist or in HR project management Exposure to project and change management initiatives Proven track record in driving and implementing people-related initiatives Experience in managing HR projects is an added advantage Strong understanding of HR processes, practices, and current trends Solid analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to interpret data, identify trends, and provide actionable insights Good project management capabilities Understanding of how HR strategies align with business objectives Effective written and verbal communication skills
